'''Glottal''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Glottal system/Legends|Glottal system]] in the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was the [[Glottalphib]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was a hot and humid planet, making it a perfect habitat for the Glottalphibs.

{{Planet-stub}}
